common.tagline: Predict the Cup with your crew.

landing.heroSubtitle: The private platform for running World Cup predictions, friend-group stakes, and a clean leaderboard all the way to the final.
landing.ctaPaymentNote: One-time $20 payment via Stripe — instant access.
landing.featuresTitle: A prediction game that stays tidy as the group grows.
landing.featuresIntro: Lucarne structures what usually ends up scattered across chats: schedule, stakes, payments, standings, and history.
landing.feature1Body: Tokens track stakes, winnings, and refunds without a shared spreadsheet or manual math.
landing.feature2Body: Predictions stay hidden until kickoff. Everyone plays their read of the match, not someone else's.
landing.feature3Body: Every result updates points, balances, and leagues so the competition stays easy to follow.
landing.workflowTitle: Three steps to launch a clean private league.
landing.workflow1Body: Set rules, member limits, and visibility before inviting your group.
landing.workflow2Body: Each member joins with a readable code, unlocks access with a single payment, and starts with their wallet ready.
landing.workflow3Body: Matches, bets, pots, and leaderboards stay synchronized in one interface.
landing.trustTitle: Built for groups where the stakes are friendly, but the organization needs to be serious.
landing.trustIntro: Lucarne keeps gameplay, payments, and history clearly separate so everyone can see what happened after a late goal or a big match.
landing.trust1Body: Rules, bets, and standings stay traceable for everyone, at any time.
landing.trust2Body: A one-time $20 payment via Stripe unlocks access instantly — no cash to chase, no manual approval.
landing.trust3Body: Invitation codes limit access and keep each league inside its own circle.
